M-059.NAME: mtproto-promotion-tag-control
M-059.path: backend/app/mtproto/promotion_tag.py backend/app/admin/router.py backend/app/core/config.py mtproto-runtime/src/kpproton_app.erl deploy/mtproto-de-compose.yml .env.example scripts/phase42-mtproto-promotion-tag-smoke.mjs scripts/phase79-cyber-title-and-mtproto-promo-safe-smoke.mjs backend/tests/test_mtproto_promotion_tag.py docs/plans/Phase-42.xml docs/plans/Phase-79.xml
M-059.owns: Operator-managed MTProxyBot promotion tag storage, validation, redaction, audit trail, runtime apply state, and deploy env propagation.
M-059.purpose: Allow the KrotPN admin to configure the Telegram MTProxy promotion tag safely from the admin panel.

exports.api-get-promotion-tag-state: Return masked tag, source, runtime status, and pending_restart flag.
exports.api-update-promotion-tag: Validate and store a new MTProxyBot tag with explicit admin confirmation.
exports.fn-validate-promotion-tag: Accept a 32-hex Telegram proxy tag or a zero 32-hex fallback; reject blanks and malformed values.
exports.fn-apply-promotion-tag: Apply to runtime when supported or mark pending restart if the data-plane requires restart.
exports.runtime-proxy-ad-tag: Pass the configured value as PROXY_AD_TAG/MTPROTO_AD_TAG without logging it.

M-059.evidence: pass-live 2026-05-23 and pass-local-phase79 2026-06-06: promotion tag validator/API tests, static smoke, runtime compile, and operator clean-deploy validation passed; Phase-79 smoke confirms anti-abuse alerts do not rotate issued links, expose full tags, or mutate promotion tag state.

external-reference.source-1: Telegram MTProxy setup documents promotion tags from @MTProxyBot and server-side proxy tag configuration at https://core.telegram.org/proxy.

constraints.constraint-1: Blank tag must never reach runtime; use explicit zero 32-hex fallback when no promotion channel is configured.
constraints.constraint-2: Full tag must not appear in admin list views, audit details, logs, telemetry, or frontend bundles.
constraints.constraint-3: Changing promotion tag must not rotate user SNI, base secret, salt, or proxy links.
constraints.constraint-4: MTProto abuse-alert handling does not change promotion tag state, expose the full tag, or treat promotion-sharing as automatic abuse.

phase-79-executed-scope.scope: Phase-79 kept promotion tag control independent from anti-abuse: links, SNI, tag validation, masking, and runtime application semantics remain unchanged.
phase-79-executed-scope.verification: PASS local: backend promotion-tag tests, Phase-42 smoke, and Phase-79 smoke prove tag state is masked and independent from MTProto alert handling.

M-059.hotspot: H-046: Promotion tag control must validate MTProxyBot tags, avoid blank runtime tags, and never log full tags
